items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-95 northbound between .5 miles north of Exit 6: PA 352/PA 320 - EDGMONT AVE/AVE OF THE STATES and .5 miles south of Exit 7: I-476 NORTH - PLYMOUTH MEETING. There is a lane restriction.
